form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months 9th of 12 at Funabashi on March 11 over 2400m, 15 len behind Odilon with 56kg at $275.40. Previously second-up 6th of 11 at Kanazawa on November 9 over 2600m, 6 len behind Vehement carrying 57kg at $28.60. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of ten weeks. Finished off last campaign won by neck Ohi January 28 over 2600m defeating Rebake Full City carrying 56kg at $2.10. When resuming last campaign second of 16 at Ohi December 25 over 2600m, 0.5 len behind Tsukaino Kizuna carrying 56kg at $1.80. Look for a bold run.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Not raced for 55 days. First-up won by 1.0 len at Nakayama Dirt January 11 over 1800m defeating Walzer Schall carrying 57.0kg at $14.30. Second run from a spell scored a big 6 len win at Saga February 12 over 2000m defeating Meisho Funjin with 56kg at $3. Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months failed to make an impression; second last of 14 at Chukyo in the G2 Kinko Sho on March 15 over 2000m, 6 len behind Shake Your Heart carrying 57.0kg at $7.30. Previously second-up 2nd of 11 at Tokyo in the G2 Mainichi Okan on October 5 over 1800m, 0.5 len behind Lebensstil with 57.0kg at $4.30. One of the top chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last preparation when last of 14 at Hanshin in the G3 Naruo Kinen December 6 over 1800m, 12 len behind David Barows carrying 57.0kg at $24.20. First up last campaign fifth of 15 at Kyoto Dirt in the G3 Miyako Stakes November 9 over 1800m, soft track; 7 len behind W Heart Bond with 57.0kg at $19.70. Major upset if he won.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped at the start and then raced wide at the turn out of the straight.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign ran on from midfield and won by a neck at Ohi Tokyo Daishoten December 29 over 2000m defeating Mikki Fight carrying 57kg at $77.30. Won previous preparation first up won by 1.0 len at Seoul September 7 over 1800m on a rain affected track defeating Chancheng Glory carrying 57kg at $7.10. Winning hope in a suitable contest.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 56-day let-up. First-up after two months favourite; won by 2.5 len at Funabashi February 11 over 1800m defeating Marble Mountain with 57kg at $2.10. Previously second-up 2nd of 14 at Funabashi on November 3 over 1800m, 2.5 len behind Ammothyella carrying 55kg at $3. Sure to go well again. Improver with winning prospects.
